svg.title: Airflow + dbt Enterprise Data Platform Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture from Postgres source through Airflow orchestration, dbt transformation, to Snowflake warehouse

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me how to configure PostgreSQL as a source for this pipeline')
sendPrompt('What external APIs or data sources can be added to this platform?')
sendPrompt('How do event streams integrate with Airflow?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the Airflow setup and docker-compose configuration')
g.text: CeleryExecutor · Redis broker · PostgreSQL metadata DB

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I write ETL DAGs in Airflow?')
sendPrompt('How do I use custom operators in Airflow for dbt?')
sendPrompt('Explain Airflow sensors for pipeline dependencies')
sendPrompt('How do I set up Airflow alerting and monitoring?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the dbt project structure: staging, intermediate, and marts layers')
sendPrompt('How do I write staging models in dbt for Postgres data?')
sendPrompt('Explain intermediate dbt models with business logic examples')
sendPrompt('How do I structure dbt mart models for reporting?')
sendPrompt('How do I configure the Snowflake connection in dbt profiles.yml?')
sendPrompt('Explain Snowflake RAW, STAGING, and PROD databases structure')
sendPrompt('What goes in the Snowflake STAGING database?')
sendPrompt('How should the Snowflake PROD analytics database be organized?')
sendPrompt('How do I connect Looker or Metabase to Snowflake for BI reporting?')
sendPrompt('How do I expose Snowflake data via APIs for downstream apps?')
sendPrompt('What reverse ETL tools work with Snowflake to sync data to SaaS apps?')

svg.text: CI/CD · GitLab Pipelines · Docker · Nginx reverse proxy · Env-based config
